title: Jwalamalini temple
tagline: Jwalamalini temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Shri Atishaya Kshetra Simhanagadde Jwala Malini Digambar Jain Temple or Atishaya Shri Kshetra Simhanagadde is a famous Jain temple in Narasimharajapura of Chikmagalur district in K

topPlaces.name: Narasimharajapura
topPlaces.description: Narasimharajapura or NRpura is a town and taluk headquarter in Chikkmagaluru district, Karnataka, India. It is situated in the Malenadu region of the district.

topPlaces.name: B.Kanabur
topPlaces.description: B.Kanabur is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Narasimharajapura taluk of Chikkamagaluru district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Aratal
topPlaces.description: Aratal is a village in Belgaum district in the southern state of Karnataka, India.

items.note: Narasimharajapura or NRpura is a town and taluk headquarter in Chikkmagaluru district, Karnataka, India. It is situated in the Malenadu region of the district.
B.Kanabur is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Narasimharajapura taluk of Chikkamagaluru district in Karnataka.
Aratal is a village in Belgaum district in the southern state of Karnataka, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jwalamalini temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jwalamalini temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jwalamalini temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (97 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (109 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jwalamalini temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jwalamalini temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jwalamalini temple?
faq.a: Stays in Jwalamalini temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jwalamalini temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Narasimharajapura, B.Kanabur, Aratal.
